raw.subject: Your Salinas page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I love seeing the smiling faces of the pets in your care. It's clear you have a passion for what you do.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, and as a petsitter, it might be costing you bookings and calls from potential clients who are looking for a reliable service.

I took a look at your Facebook page and sketched out a simple homepage idea that incorporates your services overview, photo gallery, contact section, and map & hours. Here's a preview:

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/catherine-animals-petsitting-salinas

If you're interested in learning more about how a simple website can help you grow your business, I'd love to discuss the details with you.

One flat project fee for small businesses can often make all the difference - and it's a straightforward process to get started. Please reply or let's schedule a quick call to discuss further.
